contents: {a=Person_MrTumble}Mr. Tumble{a} was caught saying "bastard" in {a=Person_Craig}Craig's{a} SRB2Kart stream.

header: Craig signs up for the Helldivers
contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} finds out about the Helldivers after a rep joins his VRChat Shenanigans and informs him about the valiant cause. He signs up when promised he would get his own personalised armour and a custom cape.
